title: CT14 static tactic graph — Aggregate closure
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT14 (Aggregate closure). It requires the complete 14-node array in fixed source order from CT14.N01 through CT14.N14, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT14 (Aggregate closure) tactic specification; must equal "CT14".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N01, "Definition — residual class C with recorded branch state", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N01, "Definition — residual class C with recorded branch state"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N01, "Definition — residual class C with recorded branch state"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N02, "Lemma — branch state forces C to carry ≥ cn deficit", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N02, "Lemma — branch state forces C to carry ≥ cn deficit"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N02, "Lemma — branch state forces C to carry ≥ cn deficit"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N03, "Lemma — members of C charge to a global o(n) resource", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N03, "Lemma — members of C charge to a global o(n) resource"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N03, "Lemma — members of C charge to a global o(n) resource"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N04, "Lemma — upper bound counts carried-charge multiplicity?", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N04, "Lemma — upper bound counts carried-charge multiplicity?"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N04, "Lemma — upper bound counts carried-charge multiplicity?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N05, "Routing theorem — which capacity datum failed?", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N05, "Routing theorem — which capacity datum failed?"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N05, "Routing theorem — which capacity datum failed?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N06, "Scope candidate — no finite bounded-capacity description — scope audit", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N06, "Scope candidate — no finite bounded-capacity description — scope audit"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N06, "Scope candidate — no finite bounded-capacity description — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N07, "Comparison theorem — ≥ cn demand versus o(n) capacity", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N07, "Comparison theorem — ≥ cn demand versus o(n) capacity"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N07, "Comparison theorem — ≥ cn demand versus o(n) capacity"; must equal "comparison", meaning this node compares certified quantities and routes every outcome.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N08, "Payload record — P_14→9: unbounded-capacity member", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N08, "Payload record — P_14→9: unbounded-capacity member"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N08, "Payload record — P_14→9: unbounded-capacity member"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N09, "Payload record — P_14→10: missing capacity label", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N09, "Payload record — P_14→10: missing capacity label"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N09, "Payload record — P_14→10: missing capacity label"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N10, "Payload lemma — P_14→9 satisfies CT9 trigger", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N10, "Payload lemma — P_14→9 satisfies CT9 trigger"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N10, "Payload lemma — P_14→9 satisfies CT9 trigger"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N11, "Payload lemma — P_14→10 satisfies CT10 trigger", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N11, "Payload lemma — P_14→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N11, "Payload lemma — P_14→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N12, "C4 — C is empty on the surviving branch", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N12, "C4 — C is empty on the surviving branch"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N12, "C4 — C is empty on the surviving branch"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N13, "CT 9 — overload", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N13, "CT 9 — overload"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N13, "CT 9 — overload"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT14.N14, "CT 10 — refinement", in CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14.N14".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT14.N14, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal the integer 14.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT14.N14, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT14 (Aggregate closure); must contain exactly 14 generic node objects in source order from CT14.N01 through CT14.N14, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
